reviews.author: gayathri lakshmi
reviews.review_body: Sugar Pie Preschool provides a warm, caring environment where children thrive through interactive learning experiences. The staff is dedicated, and the space is well-maintained, making it a popular choice among parents.

reviews.school_name: Sugar Pie Pre School & Day Care - Sector 141
reviews.author: Vanshika Bhateja
reviews.review_body: We absolutely recommend this preschool! The teachers are caring, attentive, and truly invested in the kids' development. The curriculum is engaging, and our child has learned so much while having fun. The facility is clean and well-organized, and the staff is always welcoming. You will thrilled to see your little one excited to go to school each day. Highly recommend!

reviews.school_name: Sugar Pie Pre School & Day Care - Sector 141
reviews.author: RAVI SOLANKI
reviews.review_body: Best preschool in Noida, great staff and teachers my little one has been there since a year now.

reviews.school_name: Sugar Pie Pre School & Day Care - Sector 141

reviews.review_body: The worst school i have seen only money minded not good in studies and seeing racism as my son suffered and maids are too rude with my son so that it takes time to come out of such tantrum both teachers and maids are seeing more partiality and because of such things my son took 2 months to be normal and started intracking as before until then my son keep scared of people who are wearing maid dress he will come behind me seriously am very much upset of this school

reviews.school_name: Sugar Pie Pre School & Day Care - Sector 141
reviews.author: Sanvi Gupta
reviews.review_body: Safe and funfilling school for kids... a secured place where kids enjoy n learn a lot at the same time through amazing activities!!!
